who: accounting firms processing 10–20 credit card transactions/day
offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 credit card transactions/day, manual reconciliation causes significant time loss and potential errors. We automate the extraction and reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem: Daily reconciliation of credit card transactions is time-consuming and error-prone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting help
Indie Hackers posts on similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums where accounting firms share tools
try_it: Let users try daily transaction extraction and dashboard on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant community
